faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Solar Energy

cost.question: How much does a solar system cost?
cost.answer: A typical PV system for a single-family home (5–10 kWp) costs between €7,000 and €20,000 including installation and inverter. A battery storage system adds €5,000–€15,000. Use our calculator for a more precise estimate based on your roof area.

worthIt.question: Is a solar system worth it?
worthIt.answer: In most cases, yes. With current electricity prices of approx. €0.34/kWh and a feed-in tariff of 8.03 ct/kWh, a PV system typically pays for itself in 8–13 years. Over 25 years, the return is often 5–8%.

howMuchPower.question: How much electricity does a solar system produce?
howMuchPower.answer: In Germany, a solar system produces approx. 850–1,050 kWh per kWp per year depending on location and orientation. A typical 10 kWp system delivers 8,500–10,500 kWh annually – enough for a 4-person household.

noRegistration.question: Why don't I need to register?
noRegistration.answer: OpenSolarCheck calculates everything directly in your browser. Your data never leaves your computer – there is no server storing it. That's why we don't need your email or phone number.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the calculator?
accuracy.answer: The calculation is based on EU PVGIS satellite data and the HTW Berlin model. The results are good estimates but do not replace professional on-site planning that considers local shading and roof statics.

results.disclaimer: This calculation provides rough estimates based on your inputs and publicly available weather data (PVGIS). It does not replace professional on-site planning. Factors such as local shading, roof statics, grid connection conditions, and regional subsidy programs are not considered.

methodology.title: Calculation methodology
methodology.intro: Transparency is important to us. Here we explain all calculations and their foundations.

radiation.title: Solar radiation data
radiation.text: Solar irradiation is based on data from the PVGIS system (Photovoltaic Geographical Information System) of the European Commission's Joint Research Centre. PVGIS uses satellite data and meteorological models for accurate site assessment.

yield.title: Yield calculation
yield.text: PV yield is calculated directly from PVGIS data, which already accounts for location, tilt, orientation, and system losses (14%). An additional shading factor is applied.

selfConsumption.title: Self-consumption
selfConsumption.text: The self-consumption ratio is estimated using the HTW Berlin model (Quaschning/Weniger). It is based on the BDEW H0 standard load profile for household electricity. For battery storage, the additional self-consumption increase is calculated with a battery efficiency of 90%.

economics.title: Financial analysis
economics.text: The financial analysis is based on the following assumptions:

assumptions.feedIn: Feed-in tariff: per EEG (fixed for 20 years)
assumptions.maintenance: Maintenance costs: 1.5% of investment per year

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.text: This tool does not consider: local shading from objects, roof statics and load capacity, grid connection conditions, regional/municipal subsidy programs, tax aspects.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. Below we inform you about the collection and use of personal data when using our website.

controller.title: 1. Controller
controller.text: The controller within the meaning of the GDPR is the person named in the legal notice.

overview.title: 2. Overview
overview.noData: No personal data is collected, stored, or processed beyond what is technically necessary.
overview.noTracking: There are no cookies, no user-level tracking, and no registration.
overview.local: All inputs in the PV calculator remain local in your browser (sessionStorage). No data is sent to our servers.

hosting.title: 3. Hosting
hosting.text: This website is hosted by Hetzner Online GmbH, Industriestr. 25, 91710 Gunzenhausen, Germany. When you visit our website, the hosting provider automatically collects the following data in server log files:

items.date: Date and time of the request

hosting.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in the secure provision of the website). Log files are automatically deleted after 14 days.

ssl.title: 4. SSL/TLS Encryption
ssl.text: This website uses SSL/TLS encryption for security reasons. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the lock icon in your browser's address bar and the "https://" prefix.

pvgis.title: 5. PVGIS API
pvgis.text: To calculate solar irradiation, your browser directly calls the PVGIS API of the European Commission's Joint Research Centre. Your IP address is transmitted to the EU Commission's server.
pvgis.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (contract fulfillment – the calculation is the main purpose of the service).

analytics.title: 6. Website Analytics (Umami)
analytics.intro: We use Umami, a privacy-friendly open-source analytics tool, to anonymously evaluate website usage. Umami:
analytics.dnt: respects your browser's "Do Not Track" setting
analytics.note: Only anonymous, aggregated data is collected (page views, referrers, browser type, country). No cookie banner is required as no cookies or similar technologies are used.
analytics.legal: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in improving the service).

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.restriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
rights.objection: Right to object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
rights.contact: To exercise your rights, please contact us via the email address provided in the legal notice.

complaint.title: 8. Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.text: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority regarding the processing of your personal data. A list of supervisory authorities can be found at:

changes.title: 9. Changes
changes.text: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy to reflect changes in the legal situation or changes to the service. The current version is always available on this page.

imprint.title: Legal Notice
imprint.subtitle: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (German Digital Services Act)

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general legislation pursuant to § 7 (1) DDG. According to §§ 8–10 DDG, however, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.

links.title: Liability for Links
links.content: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.

validation.tilt: Roof tilt must be between 0° and 60°
validation.area: Roof area must be between 1 and 500 m²
validation.modulePower: Module power must be between 100 and 800 Wp
validation.moduleCount: Module count must be between 1 and 200
validation.annualConsumption: Consumption must be between 0 and 100,000 kWh
validation.capacity: Storage capacity must be between 1 and 50 kWh
